transcript:
CALLER: Uh hello. Main ek new patient hoon. Kisi doctor se refer kiya gaya hoon yahan — Dr. Jog ke paas, urology ke liye.
AGENT: Aapka swagat hai! New patient registration simple hai. Aapka naam aur contact number please.
CALLER: Kashinath Rao. 9800234561.
AGENT: Shukriya Kashinath ji. Dr. Kishore Jog urology mein hain. Unka next slot hai Budhwaar 11 AM. Chalega?
CALLER: Haan, Budhwaar 11 theek hai.
AGENT: Book ho gaya. New patient hone ke naate please 15 minute pehle aana — registration complete karni hogi. Referral letter bhi saath laana. SMS aayega. Kuch aur?
CALLER: Nahi, sab samajh gaya. Shukriya.
